biography: Ricke, though a less frequent presence on the greens of the Hector Trophée, made his mark across two distinct appearances in this esteemed pairs competition. His participation, while not extensive, contributed to the diverse tapestry of competitors who have challenged themselves within its unique format.

During his two outings, Ricke demonstrated a committed approach to the event's demanding structure. Although he did not ultimately secure the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair, nor claim the individual Victor Trophy, his presence on the course underscored the spirit of competition that defines the tournament.

Presently, Ricke is regarded as having concluded his active participation in Hector events, with the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 proceeding without his direct involvement. His brief yet meaningful contributions remain a part of the tournament's history, a testament to all who have lent their skill to its evolving legacy.
